# zones

**Instance Property**

The zones in the database where the changes occurred.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute CloudKit.RecordZoneChangesOptions[] zones;
```

## Discussion

To fetch record changes in these zones, pass this property to the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database/fetchRecordZoneChanges] method in the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database] class.

## Response Properties

- **moreComing**: A Boolean value that indicates there are more database changes to fetch.
- **syncToken**: A point in the database’s change history.
